case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ENRIQUE GONZALEZ QUEZADA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,402.19 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA, ENRIQUE GONZALEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUEZADA, ENRIQUE GONZALEZ $1,402.19 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,517.19, 4300.00 LOAN PRINCIPAL LESS 3134.71 PAID =1165.29, 2100.61 ACCRUED INTEREST LESS 1945.26 PAID =155.35 150 FEES (LATE FEES) LESS 0 PAYMENT = 150. AMOUNT SOUGHT BY COMPLAINT =1402.19. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,290.06 AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA, ENRIQUE GONZALEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED DEC-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA, ENRIQUE GONZALEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2018 BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ENRIQUE GONZALEZ QUEZADA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
